name_cn:
Genuine Grade
CELIN* Upgraded Triumphal Arch Tofu Bag 188423_ Canvas/Brown
Imported canvas, imported cowhide material, pure sheepskin lining + vintage steel hardware
Triumphal Arch: Breaking through tradition with historical innovation, new LOGO upgrade
Reshaping the classic with exquisite buckle design, very in line with the fashion forefront ✔️
Size: 18.5-14-6cm (Includes original gift box 🎁)
